description.text: Take down their walls! One Base.

en.original: Take down their walls! One Base.

de.original: Take down their walls! One Base.
de.translation: Bringt ihre Mauern zum Einstürzen! Eine Basis.

pt.original: Take down their walls! One Base.

fr.original: Take down their walls! One Base.
fr.translation: Prenez les murs d'assaut ! Une base.

es.original: Take down their walls! One Base.
es.translation:
¡Derriba las paredes que lo rodean!
Un núcleo.

ru.original: Take down their walls! One Base.
ru.translation: Немного настойчивости, и вражеские стены падут. Одна база.
